Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 5th, 2010 (Wide) by Walt Disney
March 5th, 2010 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: March 4th, 2010 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 4th, 2010 (Wide) (Australia)
April 17th, 2010 (Wide), released as Alice in Wonderland (アリス・イン・ワンダーランド) (Japan)

August 29th, 2024 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: June 1st, 2010 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for fantasy action/violence involving scary images and situations, and for a smoking caterpillar
(Rating bulletin 2107, 2/10/2010)
Running Time: 108 minutes
Franchise: Alice in Wonderland
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Live Action Remake, Motion Capture Performance, Same Actor, Multiple Roles
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Arranged Marriage, Dragon, Hallucinations, Non-Chronological, Sibling Rivalry, Talking Animals, Twins
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Roth Films, Zancuk Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
